codeReview.summary: The polish pass adds meaningful accessibility and resilience improvements: visible `:focus-visible` treatment, Escape-key dismissal coverage, initial loading affordances, and a retryable backend-error banner layered over the existing fallback data path. I did not find any blocking correctness gaps in the implemented scope.

summary: Pass. The accessibility and UX polish work satisfies the keyboard, loading-state, and backend-error requirements without introducing obvious regressions.
